name: Arkport
summary: Western New York near the southern Finger Lakes: small-community schools, place-based STEM, and how rural districts connect to the wider research trip.

name: Bradford
summary: Small town in the Illinois heartland: community context, school size, and what you want to explore in STEM access.

name: Grand Island
summary: Central Nebraska: agricultural roots, a regional hub, and the distance to STEM pathways beyond high school.

name: Boise
summary: Treasure Valley: state capital and hub—how rural-adjacent districts and students connect to STEM pathways.

name: Cave Springs
summary: Northwest Arkansas: small-community schools against the shadow of a fast-growing region, and who gets seen in STEM.

name: North Florida
summary: North Florida: a big city with rural-adjacent districts—stories of access, college pathways, and STEM identity in the South.
